crop_w.desc: Width/height of crop box (always square). Providing a "crop box" with `crop_x`, `crop_y`, and `crop_w` is optional.

crop_x.desc: X coordinate of top-left corner of crop box. Providing a "crop box" with `crop_x`, `crop_y`, and `crop_w` is optional.

crop_y.desc: Y coordinate of top-left corner of crop box. Providing a "crop box" with `crop_x`, `crop_y`, and `crop_w` is optional.

errors.bad_image: The uploaded image could not be processed - try passing a JPEG, GIF or PNG
errors.too_large: The uploaded image had excessive dimensions
errors.too_many_frames: An animated GIF with too many frames was uploaded
